asymmetry: ISA contribution limits reset annually but the allowance is not cumulative — money not saved in a given year is permanently lost to the tax-free wrapper, a fact HMRC does not proactively communicate.

script.intrusion: Every pound you didn't put in an ISA this year is gone permanently.
script.weight: The annual ISA allowance is £20,000. If you don't use it by April 5th, that tax-free capacity is gone permanently — not carried forward, not recovered. HMRC does not send a reminder.
script.mechanism: HMRC created the ISA wrapper in 1999. Each April 5th, any unused allowance disappears — permanently. It does not roll over. The wrapper itself protects every pound inside it from income tax and capital gains tax for life. But HMRC does not remind you. Your bank does not remind you. The deadline is structural. The silence around it is deliberate.
script.proof: HMRC's ISA statistics, published annually, show £3.7 billion in unclaimed ISA allowance in the 2022-23 tax year. That is permanent, irrecoverable tax exposure for the people who missed the April 5th deadline.
script.comment_trigger: How much of your £20,000 ISA allowance have you used this year?
script.move: What financially-aware people use to navigate this is Trading 212.

visual_direction.frame_description: Extreme close-up of a bank statement, numbers slightly out of focus, single column of figures barely visible
visual_direction.light_source: Single overhead fluorescent tube, directly above, casting sharp downward shadows
visual_direction.motion: Ken Burns: slow pull back from 120% to 100%, revealing more of the document, 75 seconds duration
visual_direction.kling_prompt: extreme close-up bank statement paper texture, cold fluorescent overhead light, sharp downward shadows, numbers barely legible, cinematic 9:16 vertical, dark atmosphere, documentary realism, no faces, no people
visual_direction.negative_prompt: faces, people, warm colours, sunlight, lifestyle imagery, text overlays, happy, bright, colorful, outdoors

visual_dna.world: extreme close-up of physical objects — paper fibres, metal grain, ink, fabric weave, glass surface — texture becomes landscape
visual_dna.camera_system: Canon EF 100mm L macro, bellows extension, f/4-f/8, extreme magnification ratio
visual_dna.film: Fujichrome Velvia 100 — ultra-saturation, microscopic grain, hyper-sharp, colour density
visual_dna.lighting_primary: single raking side light at 10° angle — surface texture revealed as topography
visual_dna.lighting_secondary: ring flash fill at quarter power — depth preserved
visual_dna.motion_character: micro-dolly or macro rail — movement measured in millimetres over seconds
visual_dna.anchor_text: subject material + raking light angle + magnification scale consistency
visual_dna.full_anchor: [Visual DNA — embed unchanged in every clip] Consistent emotional register and colour temperature throughout. Each shot's aesthetic serves its moment. Temporal energy consistency.

shot_list.intent: Stop the scroll. Establish tension before explanation.
shot_list.prompt: Shot 1 (0–5s): World: extreme close-up of physical objects — paper fibres, metal grain, ink, fabric weave, glass surface — texture becomes landscape. Camera system: Canon EF 100mm L macro, bellows extension, f/4-f/8, extreme magnification ratio.  Empty office desk. Untouched ISA paperwork sits under a paperweight. A phone screen lights up — notification unseen. Optics: 24mm lens, f/2.0, wide field, slight environmental distortion. Camera: static for 0.5 seconds, then aggressive slow dolly forward. Lighting: single raking side light at 10° angle — surface texture revealed as topography. harsh overhead fluorescent 5600K, cold blue-white, flat institutional light, deep shadows beneath subject. Film stock: Fujichrome Velvia 100 — ultra-saturation, microscopic grain, hyper-sharp, colour density. Atmosphere: light quality static throughout, no atmospheric progression. [Visual DNA — embed unchanged in every clip] Consistent emotional register and colour temperature throughout. Each shot's aesthetic serves its moment. Temporal energy consistency. Avoid: watermarks, text overlays, subtitle artifacts, camera jitter, morphing surfaces, flickering light, inconsistent shadows. Also avoid: wide establishing shots, human faces, architecture, depth of field, environmental context.

shot_list.intent: Show how it works. Documentary observation, information discovered.
shot_list.prompt: Shot 2: World: sterile white or pale grey environments — examination rooms, clean surfaces, clinical precision over warmth. Camera system: Leica SL2, APO-Summicron 50mm f/2 ASPH, ultra-clinical resolution, no aberration.  ISA wrapper mechanism shown through simple visual metaphor — money inside protected versus money outside taxed. Optics: 50mm lens, f/4.0, enough DoF to show environment and subject together. Camera: slow orbital around object or environment element, 180 degrees over 5 seconds. Lighting: overhead fluorescent 6500K — perfectly diffused, shadowless, flat institutional. harsh overhead fluorescent 5600K, cold blue-white, flat institutional light, deep shadows beneath subject. Film stock: clean digital — zero grain, daylight balanced, clinical saturation 0.75 — truth over emotion. Atmosphere: light quality static throughout, no atmospheric progression. [Visual DNA — embed unchanged in every clip] Consistent emotional register and colour temperature throughout. Each shot's aesthetic serves its moment. Temporal energy consistency. Avoid: watermarks, text overlays, subtitle artifacts, camera jitter, morphing surfaces, flickering light, inconsistent shadows. Also avoid: warm tones, soft light, bokeh, natural environments, human warmth, texture, atmosphere.

shot_list.intent: Resolution energy. Forward motion. The action the viewer must take.
shot_list.prompt: Shot 3: World: sterile white or pale grey environments — examination rooms, clean surfaces, clinical precision over warmth. Camera system: Leica SL2, APO-Summicron 50mm f/2 ASPH, ultra-clinical resolution, no aberration.  Person at a laptop. ISA application page open. Cursor moves. The action is being taken. Camera moves with the resolution. Optics: 24mm lens, f/2.8, wide to emphasise forward movement and environment opening up. Camera: slow crane upward revealing scale and forward direction simultaneously. Lighting: overhead fluorescent 6500K — perfectly diffused, shadowless, flat institutional. practical desk lamp warm 2800K from below left, harsh shadow on right side, chiaroscuro ratio 5:1. Film stock: clean digital — zero grain, daylight balanced, clinical saturation 0.75 — truth over emotion. Atmosphere: steam or breath barely visible in cold air, secondary motion from ventilation barely stirs any fabric. [Visual DNA — embed unchanged in every clip] Consistent emotional register and colour temperature throughout. Each shot's aesthetic serves its moment. Temporal energy consistency. Avoid: watermarks, text overlays, subtitle artifacts, camera jitter, morphing surfaces, flickering light, inconsistent shadows. Also avoid: warm tones, soft light, bokeh, natural environments, human warmth, texture, atmosphere.
